title: Privacy & Disclaimer
text:
Privacy & Cookies
We use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to collect anonymous site usage data.
This may involve cookies to track sessions, page views, and returning visitors.

Cookies used: _ga, _gid
Purpose: Analyze site traffic and improve user experience

IP anonymization: Enabled

Third-party access: Data is processed by Google under their privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

You may withdraw consent at any time by clearing your cookies.

title: Privacy & Disclaimer
text:
Disclaimer

If you have concerns regarding your privacy or site content, please contact me.

title: BBS Access
text:
## Connecting to GB7CAM BBS
This node runs a LINBPQ-based AX.25 mailbox system.

title: BBS Access
text:
Connect Command
C GB7CAM

title: BBS Access
text:
Services Available

Personal messages
Bulletins
Node list (if linked)
Forwarded mail (if configured)

title: BBS Access
text:
Notes
Access method depends on local RF or network configuration.

title: Technical Information
text:
## System Overview
GB7CAM runs a LINBPQ-based packet radio node.

title: Technical Information
text:
Components

AX.25 packet radio stack

LINBPQ switch/router

VHF 2m RF interface

title: Technical Information
text:
Configuration Notes

Frequency: 144.950 MHz

Mode: AX.25 Packet

Antenna: 5m AGL

title: Technical Information
text:
Operator Notes
This page is intended for sysops and technical reference.

title: Mail System
text:
## Mail Forwarding
GB7CAM supports AX.25 mailbox-style message handling.

title: Mail System
text:
Features

Local message storage
Optional forwarding (if enabled)
Inter-node routing via LINBPQ

title: Mail System
text:
Message Format
Standard BPQ mail format is used for compatibility with other nodes.

title: Mail System
text:
Status
Mail forwarding availability depends on node operational status.
